introSection: Flight of the Phoenix (Chinese: 飞天凤凰) was a steel roller coaster located at Harborland in Beilun, Ningbo, Zhejiang, China. It was one of three Intamin eight-inversion roller coasters. The coaster closed with Harborland on 15 October 2019.
fullText:
Flight of the Phoenix (Chinese: 飞天凤凰) was a steel roller coaster located at Harborland in Beilun, Ningbo, Zhejiang, China. It was one of three Intamin eight-inversion roller coasters. The coaster closed with Harborland on 15 October 2019.

Yellow track with purple supports.
